listings.name: Casa Solis
listings.short: A private-pool villa in a gated society of just fourteen — resort living at North Goa's most desirable address.
description: A luxury three-to-four bedroom villa in prime Siolim, wrapped around its own private swimming pool. Portuguese-arched windows, terrazzo floors and hand-laid patterned tile give every room genuine Goan character.
Set within an exclusive gated community of only fourteen villas — secure, serene, and minutes from the best beaches and tables in North Goa.
features: Luxury interiors, premium finishes
Private resort-style swimming pool
Exclusive gated society of 14 villas
24/7 gated security & privacy
Covered, secure car park
Strong rental yield potential
Excellent resale value, prime Siolim
Beaches, cafés & demand nearby
listings.location_note: Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans & title docs on request

listings.name: Casa Mahua
listings.short: A fully-furnished 3-bedroom villa with a private pool and rooftop terrace, moments from Anjuna — ready to move in.
description: An independent three-bedroom villa in the heart of Anjuna, North Goa's most sought-after coast. Full-height glazing folds the tropical garden and private pool into every living space, while signature black-and-white patterned floors and a sculpted geometric ceiling give the home its distinct Goan-modern character.
Offered fully furnished and ready to move in. Freehold title, private parking, and a rooftop terrace for sundowners complete the package.
features: Fully furnished, ready to move in
Private swimming pool & landscaped garden
Rooftop terrace for sundowners
Freehold title — clear ownership
Private car parking
Full-height glazing, indoor-outdoor living
Walk to Anjuna's cafés & beaches
listings.location_note: Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans & title docs on request

listings.name: 4 BHK Independent Villa
listings.short: A four-bedroom villa in leafy Aldona — twin master suites with skylight baths, a private plunge pool, and a rooftop terrace over the river-green valley.
description: An independent four-bedroom villa in Aldona, one of North Goa's greenest and most storied villages, where the Mapusa river and Portuguese-era lanes set an unhurried pace. Laid out over three levels (G+2), the home opens onto a private landscaped garden, a plunge pool, and wide balconies that frame the valley.

The ground floor holds an open living and dining space, a modern kitchen, a guest bedroom and a powder room. Above sit two master suites — each with its own skylit bathroom — a family lounge, and a rooftop terrace made for sundowners. A servant room and covered parking complete the home, which is offered fully furnished on completion.
features: Twin master suites with skylight bathrooms
Private plunge pool & landscaped garden
Rooftop terrace lounge for sundowners
Double-height living with valley views
Modern kitchen, guest bedroom & powder room
Wide balconies across every level
Servant room & covered parking
Offered fully furnished on completion
listings.location_note: Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans & title docs on request

listings.name: Villa Quagga
listings.short: A ready-to-move 3-bedroom villa in Morjim — Portuguese arches, wooden-rafter ceilings, zellige bathrooms and a private courtyard pool, fully furnished.
description: A characterful three-bedroom villa in the quiet townlet of Morjim, North Goa, where Portuguese whimsy meets tropical minimalism. Arched windows, wooden-rafter ceilings and hand-glazed zellige bathrooms give every room genuine Goan-Mediterranean character, while a double-height living room opens to field and garden views.

Offered fully furnished and ready to move in. A private courtyard pool, subtropical garden and large terrace complete the home — with round-the-clock concierge, property management and security on hand. Morjim beach is minutes away.
features: Fully furnished, ready to move in
Private courtyard swimming pool
Portuguese arches & wooden-rafter ceilings
Hand-glazed zellige designer bathrooms
Double-height living with field views
Subtropical garden & landscaped sit-out
24/7 concierge, management & security
listings.location_note: Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.

listings.name: 5 BHK Luxury Villa
listings.short: Our most substantial residence — a Portuguese-Mediterranean villa in Siolim across four levels, with five suites, a home theatre, spa, lift and private pool.
description: A landmark residence under construction in Siolim, North Goa — a Portuguese-Mediterranean villa arranged over four levels, from a lower-ground garden suite to a rooftop terrace bar. Arched colonnades, terracotta-tiled roofs and full-height windows frame a private pool and sun deck at its heart.

Five bedroom suites, a home theatre, a spa with steam room, and a passenger lift serving every floor make this the most substantial home in our collection. Set on an 800 sq.m plot with sub-tropical gardens, staff quarters and covered parking.
Currently under construction. Floor plans and the full area statement are available on request; price on application.
features: Five bedroom suites across four levels
Private swimming pool & sun deck
Passenger lift to every floor
Home theatre / audio-visual room
Spa with shower & steam room
Rooftop terrace with bar
Staff quarters & covered parking
Sub-tropical landscaped gardens
listings.location_note: Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans & area statement on request

inspiration.note: The villa is under construction, so its interiors are yet to be built. These are reference visuals — chosen with the architects to convey the intended Portuguese-Mediterranean design language, materials and mood. They are not photographs of this home.

listings.name: D7 Oceans
listings.short: A boutique gated collection of wellness studio residences in Orlim, South Goa — conceived as turnkey retreats with certified air, acoustic and thermal comfort, and a managed short-stay rental programme.
description: D7 Oceans is a boutique, gated low-rise in Orlim — a quiet riverside pocket of South Goa's Salcete belt. Its studio residences are conceived not as ordinary units but as turnkey wellness retreats: calm, self-contained spaces designed to host, heal and rest, wrapped in a warm Indo-Portuguese architecture of pitched terracotta roofs, arched detailing and rattan interiors.

What sets the project apart is how it is built and tested. Each home is delivered to a measured standard of comfort — certified indoor air quality, acoustic insulation for genuinely quiet stays, thermal-insulated green-building construction that keeps interiors cool through the Goan summer, and Vaastu-aligned layouts intended to support clarity and better sleep.

For an owner, it is designed to work as much as it rests. A plug-and-play managed programme handles listing, hosting and upkeep, positioning each studio for the premium short-stay and wellness-travel market — a lifestyle asset that can be enjoyed and let with equal ease.
features: Studio residences designed as turnkey wellness retreats
Certified indoor air-quality standards
Acoustic insulation engineered for genuinely quiet stays
Thermal-insulated, green-building construction — cooler interiors, lower power bills
Vaastu-aligned layouts and energy flow
Plug-and-play managed-rental programme — listing, hosting and upkeep handled
Boutique gated low-rise with landscaped grounds
Positioned for the premium short-stay and wellness-travel market
listings.location_note: Orlim sits in the calm riverside heart of Salcete, minutes from the Sal River and South Goa's quieter beaches, yet within an easy drive of Margao and the airport — a restful base with genuine rental pull.
listings.brokerage_note: Full title, approvals and specification pack shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Horizon 14
listings.short: Contemporary 2 BHK holiday homes in upmarket Bambolim — a boutique gated low-rise with a resort-style pool, minutes from Panjim and the Atal Setu bridge.
description: Horizon 14 is a boutique collection of contemporary 2 BHK holiday homes in Bambolim — one of North Goa's best-connected addresses, moments from Panjim, the NH-66 and the landmark Atal Setu bridge. Its sculpted, organic architecture, with curved balconies and warm laterite-stone accents, gives the building a character all its own amid the tropical greenery.

Inside, light-filled living spaces open through wide sliding glass to private balconies, framed by wood-slat feature walls, gold accent lighting and modular kitchens. Well-proportioned bedrooms, vitrified flooring, teak main doors and a warm contemporary palette carry the same considered detailing through every home.

Conceived to live as easily as it lets, Horizon 14 pairs a resort-style swimming pool, gated security, covered stilt parking and lifts with power backup — close to Goa Medical College, Goa University and Dabolim airport. A holiday home with genuine rental pull, ready for possession in May 2028.
features: Contemporary 2 BHK holiday homes in upmarket Bambolim
Resort-style swimming pool
Boutique gated low-rise (G + 4) with covered stilt parking
Sculpted architecture — curved balconies & laterite accents
Light-filled living, wood-slat feature walls & modular kitchens
Minutes from Panjim, the NH-66 & the Atal Setu bridge
Automatic lifts with power backup, CCTV & 24/7 security
Strong holiday-let and rental appeal — possession May 2028
listings.location_note: Bambolim sits on the doorstep of Panjim in North Goa, wrapped in tropical greenery yet moments from the NH-66, the Atal Setu bridge and the city — a rare balance of calm and connectivity. Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Rate sheet, floor plans, RERA & title documents shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Tamega
listings.short: A gated enclave of seven paddy-field-facing villas in Marna, Siolim — 3-bedroom homes with double-height living, private infinity pools and Portuguese-inspired architecture.
description: Tamega is a serene residential enclave of just seven homes, set across 2,475 square metres in the coveted village of Marna, Siolim. Each villa is thoughtfully composed to exude quiet luxury and a deep connection to Goa's landscape — framed by open paddy fields and lush countryside, yet minutes from the beaches and bars of the north.

The architecture draws on Goa's Portuguese heritage — earthy tones, timeless proportions and modern comfort in equal measure. Inside, a double-height living area is bathed in natural light and opens through an open-plan layout to a contemporary kitchen and dining space. Three inviting bedrooms, including a master suite, are finished with soft hues and modern en-suite bathrooms with upscale fittings.

Every home is wrapped around its own private infinity pool and landscaped garden, with a generous pool deck for slow Goan evenings. Managed hospitality — from 24/7 concierge and housekeeping to airport transfers and a private butler on request — makes each villa as easy to own as it is to enjoy.
features: Boutique gated enclave of only seven villas
Private infinity pool & landscaped garden to every home
Double-height living area filled with natural light
3 large bedrooms with modern en-suite bathrooms
Portuguese-inspired architecture in warm, earthy tones
Paddy-field-facing plots across a 2,475 sq m enclave
24/7 concierge, housekeeping & security
Airport transfers & private butler service on request
listings.location_note: Marna, Siolim sits in Goa's peaceful northern countryside — lush, green and unhurried, yet close to the lively beaches, restaurants and cultural landmarks of the north. A rare balance of seclusion and connectivity. Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans, pricing, RERA & title documents shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Caladium
listings.short: An intimate enclave of nine Portuguese-inspired villas in Vaddo, Siolim — 4-bedroom homes across three levels, each with a private pool, double-height living and hand-finished heritage detailing.
description: Caladium is an intimate gated enclave of just nine Portuguese-inspired villas, tucked into the palm-shaded countryside of Vaddo, Siolim. Arched façades, terracotta Mangalore-tiled roofs and hand-finished details blend effortlessly into Goa's landscape, while each home stands on its own generous plot for genuine privacy and space.

Every villa unfolds across three levels around soaring double-height living areas, tall French doors and graceful arched openings that pull in natural light. A rich material palette — lime-finished walls, cement-tile and natural-stone floors, exposed timber beams and imported marble — carries through four en-suite bedrooms, a spa-inspired master and a modular kitchen with premium appliances. Integrated smart-home automation and split air-conditioning are built in throughout.

Outdoors, a private swimming pool with an anti-skid limestone deck sits amid landscaped gardens, gazebos and shaded verandahs made for alfresco dining. With private parking, a staff room and power backup — and Siolim's beaches, riverside and dining moments away — Caladium is equally a graceful family home and a high-yield holiday-let investment.
features: Intimate gated enclave of only nine villas
Portuguese-inspired architecture — arched façades & terracotta roofs
Private swimming pool with anti-skid limestone deck to every villa
Soaring double-height living with tall French doors
Four en-suite bedrooms including a spa-inspired master
Modular kitchen with premium appliances & integrated smart-home automation
Landscaped gardens, gazebos & shaded verandahs for alfresco living
Private parking, staff room & power backup — strong holiday-let appeal
listings.location_note: Cradled in the bends of the Chapora River, Siolim is one of North Goa's most sought-after villages — heritage charm and riverside calm, minutes from Morjim, Vagator, Anjuna and Arambol, and just 20 minutes from Mopa International Airport. Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans, plot-wise pricing, specifications, RERA & title documents shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Sanctuary at 108
listings.short: A 3-bedroom Balinese-inspired villa just 650 m from Fatrade Beach in South Goa — soft arches, open courtyards and a 9 × 14 metre private pool on a 750 sqm freehold plot.
description: Sanctuary at 108 is a private Balinese-inspired villa set just 650 metres from Fatrade Beach, in one of South Goa's most pristine and quietly tucked-away coastal settings. Inspired by the tranquil elegance of Balinese design, the home embraces open spaces, natural light and a seamless connection to the tropical landscape — a rhythm of calm and simplicity, a sanctuary by the sea.

Soft arches and open volumes give way to seamless indoor–outdoor living, finished in natural materials and a warm tropical palette. Full-height windows and skylights flood every room with daylight, framing views of greenery and sky, while landscaped gardens, quiet sit-outs and open courtyards create intimate spaces to relax and entertain amid lush greenery.

The three-bedroom villa sits on a 750 sqm freehold plot, with 250 sqm of built space designed around light and openness and 300 sqm of landscaped gardens. A 9 × 14 metre private pool forms the heart of the home, complemented by detached staff quarters, power backup and security infrastructure for effortless everyday living. Freehold land ownership with a bespoke villa — priced significantly below prevailing luxury market rates, with strong early-buyer potential.
features: Balinese-inspired architecture with soft arches & open volumes
Seamless indoor–outdoor living in natural materials
9 × 14 metre private pool at the heart of the home
Full-height windows & skylights framing greenery and sky
750 sqm freehold plot with 300 sqm of landscaped gardens
Detached staff quarters, power backup & security infrastructure
Just 650 m from Fatrade Beach in pristine South Goa
Freehold ownership, priced below prevailing luxury rates
listings.location_note: Fatrade sits along South Goa's most pristine stretch of coast — quietly tucked away just off the main highway, wrapped in lush natural greenery yet minutes from Varca, Benaulim and Colva. Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans, RERA & title documents shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Elite Square
listings.short: Contemporary 2 & 3 BHK apartments in a gated, amenity-rich enclave on the fringes of upmarket Porvorim — resort-style pool, landscaped gardens and clubhouse, minutes from Panjim and Mall de Goa.
description: Elite Square is a gated, ready-to-move-in residential enclave of contemporary 2 and 3 BHK apartments set on the fringes of Porvorim, one of North Goa's most upmarket and best-connected addresses. Laid out across four low-rise blocks around landscaped gardens, a fountain plaza and a resort-style swimming pool, it commands open views of gorgeous natural greenery while keeping the city moments away.

The homes are designed around light and space — a spacious living room set apart from the dining area, well-proportioned bedrooms with ample natural light, and private covered terraces that open to the serenity of nature. Apartments come fitted with a modular kitchen, air-conditioning and fans, with 2 BHK homes from ~117 sq m and 3 BHK homes at ~141 sq m of built-up area.

A full suite of amenities serves the whole family — a fully-equipped gymnasium, yoga and meditation zone, badminton and half-basketball courts, indoor games, a children's play area, a party hall and clubhouse, and a senior-citizens' zone. The gated complex adds 24-hour security, CCTV, video phones, power back-up, EV charging and an earthquake-resistant structure. With shopping, malls, schools, banks and hospitals right outside the gate, daily life is effortless. Ready to move in today, 2 BHK homes start at ₹1.33 crore and 3 BHK homes from ₹2.04 crore — indicative and exclusive of stamp duty, registration and statutory charges.
features: Ready to move in — 2 BHK from ₹1.33 Cr, 3 BHK from ₹2.04 Cr
Contemporary 2 & 3 BHK apartments in upmarket Porvorim
Gated enclave of four low-rise blocks around landscaped gardens
Resort-style swimming pool & fountain plaza
Clubhouse, party hall, gym, yoga & indoor games zones
Badminton & half-basketball courts, children's play area
Private covered terraces opening to greenery
Modular kitchen, air-conditioning & fans included
24-hr security, CCTV, power back-up, EV charging & lifts
Minutes from Panjim, Mall de Goa & the NH-66 highway
listings.location_note: Set just off the Panaji–Mapusa highway in Alto Porvorim, Elite Square balances a tranquil, greenery-wrapped setting with rare proximity to the capital, Mall de Goa and North Goa's vibrant beach belt — with schools, banks, hospitals and markets close at hand. Drive times are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Goa RERA registered. Full cost sheet, floor plans & registration details shared on enquiry.

listings.name: City of Joy
listings.short: A gated Mediterranean-style community in Pilerne — 3, 4 & 5 bedroom independent villas each with a private pool, wrap-around penthouses and a branded retail high street, ideally placed between Panjim, Mapusa and both airports.
description: City of Joy is a complete gated development of luxurious villas, penthouses and branded retail outlets set in the picturesque village of Pilerne — a few minutes from the ever-popular beaches of Calangute and Candolim, yet close to the fast-developing commercial hub of Porvorim. Wrapped in green paddy fields and hillocks and beside the Pilerne lake, it enjoys excellent highway connectivity to Panjim on the Mandovi, the market town of Mapusa, and both the Dabolim and Mopa airports.

With modern architecture reminiscent of the Mediterranean, the community offers 3, 4 and 5 bedroom independent villas within the safety of a gated enclave — each with its own private swimming pool, ample parking and verandah sit-outs framing landscaped gardens. Arched windows, tiled roofs and double-height living rooms give every home genuine character, while the larger five-bedroom villas add a private lift and staff quarters for families with help. Villa built-up sizes range from roughly 2,664 sq ft for a three-bedroom home to 4,771 sq ft for a five-bedroom.

For those who prefer apartment living, wrap-around penthouses open onto private terrace gardens and share a common pool at the first-floor terrace level. The commercial section brings a branded retail high street and shops arranged around a spacious central plaza. Homes are finished with Kohler and Hansgrohe fittings, teak-wood doors, granite kitchens, concealed fibre-optic cabling, CCTV, DG power back-up and air-conditioning provision — with landscaped gardens, individual car parks, visitor parking and 24-hour security throughout. Experience the lap of luxury at a prestigious Pilerne address.
features: 3, 4 & 5 bedroom independent villas, each with a private pool
Mediterranean styling — arched windows, tiled roofs & verandahs
Gated community with 24-hour security & CCTV surveillance
Five-bedroom villas with a private lift & staff quarters
Wrap-around penthouses with terrace gardens & a common terrace pool
Branded retail high street & shops around a central plaza
Landscaped gardens, individual car parks & visitor parking
Kohler/Hansgrohe fittings, granite kitchens, fibre-optic, DG & AC provision
1.6 km to Mall de Goa; 7.5 km to Panjim, between Mopa & Dabolim airports
listings.location_note: Pilerne sits amid green paddy fields, hillocks and the Pilerne lake, minutes from the Calangute–Candolim beach belt and the Porvorim commercial hub, with excellent highway links to Panjim, Mapusa and both airports. Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans, unit sizes, RERA & pricing shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Upper Crest
listings.short: An exclusive eight-storey residential tower of just thirty-six three-bedroom apartments near Muth in Gogol, Margao — purely residential, with a clubhouse, rooftop sky walking track and terrace garden promenade, moments from Margao town.
description: Upper Crest is a thoughtfully designed residential tower rising near Muth in Gogol, just off the Margao–Curtorim road — a quiet, well-connected pocket of South Goa moments from Margao town, the Eastern Bypass and Big Foot Circle. Conceived as an exclusive address of only thirty-six three-bedroom homes, it is a fully residential building with no commercial activity, so the privacy and calm of home is never infringed upon.

Every apartment is planned around light and air — windows oriented for maximum sunlight with generous wind channelling, wide balconies, French doors and enclosed utility balconies framing open views. The tower stands over two levels of stilt car parking (P1 + P2) beneath eight residential floors, served by two automatic elevators — one passenger and one service — with power back-up for lifts and common areas, 24-hour CCTV monitoring of key areas and a fire-fighting system throughout.

Interiors are finished to a high standard: vitrified flooring, laminated door shutters, UPVC windows, natural-stone window sills, granite kitchen platforms with stainless-steel sinks, European-style bathroom fittings, modular electrical switches and intercom to security — with provision for air-conditioning, water purifier, washing machine and dishwasher, plus fibre-optic cabling for high-speed internet. Shared amenities include a clubhouse with indoor games, a rooftop sky walking track, a terrace garden promenade, the 'Shunyaa' yoga point and a dedicated activity and party area — an elevated way of everyday living.
features: Just 36 exclusive 3-bedroom apartments — purely residential, no commercial activity
Eight residential floors over two levels of stilt parking (P1 + P2)
Two automatic elevators — one passenger, one service — with power back-up
Clubhouse with indoor games plus a dedicated activity & party area
Rooftop sky walking track & a stunning terrace garden promenade
'Shunyaa' yoga point for calm, open-air mornings
24-hour CCTV of key areas, intercom to security & full fire-fighting system
Vitrified flooring, UPVC windows, granite kitchens & European-style fittings
Provision for AC, water purifier, washer & dishwasher; fibre-optic internet
listings.location_note: Gogol sits just off the Margao–Curtorim road near Muth, minutes from Margao town, the Eastern Bypass and Big Foot Circle, with the railway station and Dabolim airport within an easy drive. Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Goa RERA registered. Floor plans, unit sizes, pricing & registration details shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Amara
listings.short: A rare collection of just eight grand three-bedroom spa villas in Socorro, North Goa — each a four-level sanctuary with its own walk-in plunge pool, private lift, steam room and rooftop jacuzzi, minutes from Porvorim and the beaches beyond.
description: Amara is a limited collection of only eight spa villas set among the paddy fields and heritage homes of Socorro — a serene village in North Goa where rolling green fields meet the buzz of Porvorim, just five minutes away. Conceived as soulful sanctuaries rather than mere homes, each residence is a study in biophilic, GRIHA-certified design that reconnects you with nature without asking you to compromise on comfort. Only eight will ever exist.

Every villa is a grand three-bedroom residence rising over four levels, wrapped around a walk-in plunge pool you step into straight from the living room — no barriers, just liquid luxury. Vaulted, dome-topped architecture frames arched windows and wide balconies, while a private lift connects the ground-floor living, dining and kitchen up through en-suite bedrooms to a top-floor skylight lounge, steam room and rooftop jacuzzi open to the stars. A water feature greets you at the entrance, and spa-like bathrooms, a lavish master bath, walk-in wardrobes and a hardwood staircase complete the sense of a private resort.

Villas come semi-furnished with a premium modular kitchen, luxury bathroom fittings, energy-efficient air-conditioning, smart-home automation and 24/7 power back-up. Beyond your door: serene landscaped gardens, a barbecue station, a home theatre, EV charging and secure access with video surveillance — plus chef-on-call and nanny-on-call services for effortless living. This is conscious luxury, uncompromised — an address that teaches the calendar to unwind.
features: A rare collection of only eight grand three-bedroom spa villas
Walk-in plunge pool stepped straight from the living room
Private lift serving all four levels of the villa
Rooftop jacuzzi & open courtyard, open to the stars
Skylight lounge crowning the top floor
Vaulted, dome-topped architecture with arched windows & wide balconies
Spa-like bathrooms & a lavish master bath in every home
GRIHA-certified biophilic design that reconnects you with nature
Semi-furnished & turnkey — designed for effortless living or letting
listings.location_note: Socorro is a tranquil village in North Goa's Bardez belt, where paddy fields and misty hills meet designer boutiques and opulent mansions — minutes from Porvorim's central business district and an easy drive to the beaches, casinos and Mopa airport. Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Villa layouts, plot sizes, specifications, pricing & registration details shared on enquiry.
listings.amenities_note: At Amara the amenities are the address. Each villa is a self-contained spa and hospitality suite — engineered so that everything, from a morning swim to a chef-cooked dinner, happens entirely within your own walls.

items: Walk-in plunge pool off the living room

rental.label: The Investment Case
rental.headline: Purpose-built for North Goa's luxury short-stay market.
rental.note: With a private plunge pool, steam room, home theatre and chef- and nanny-on-call, each villa is built to command premium nightly tariffs in one of North Goa's most sought-after belts — five minutes from Porvorim and fifteen from Baga & Calangute. Indicative gross rental yields for comparable managed luxury villas here typically run ~6–8% p.a. with strong peak-season occupancy, while a scarcity of only eight sanctuaries supports long-term capital appreciation. Figures are indicative and depend on furnishing, management and occupancy — detailed rental projections and a managed-let plan are shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Namasyaa
listings.short: A boutique cluster of Indo-Portuguese-style 3 BHK pool villas in Betalbatim, South Goa — each with its own plunge pool and a rooftop pergola lounge in the palms, minutes from Colva Beach and an easy drive to Margao.
description: Namasyaa sits in Betalbatim, one of South Goa's most quietly coveted coastal villages — a green, unhurried enclave off Colva Road where coconut groves still outnumber compound walls. Colva Beach and Betalbatim's famous sunset sands are both minutes away, and Margao's markets, schools and railway station are an easy drive inland.

The villas themselves are a study in the Indo-Portuguese vernacular done properly: terracotta-tiled roofs, arched balconies, bay windows and deep awnings over walled garden courts. Each residence is a three-bedroom home rising over three levels — living, dining and kitchen opening to a private plunge pool at the entrance court, bedrooms above, and the whole home crowned by a rooftop lounge under a vine-laced pergola, open to the palm canopy.

Currently under construction, Namasyaa is built for the way South Goa is actually lived in — slow mornings by your own pool, evenings on the roof terrace, and the beach a short stroll or spin away. Villa layouts, plot sizes, specifications and pricing are shared on enquiry, along with a site visit at a time that suits you.
features: Boutique cluster of Indo-Portuguese-style pool villas
Three-bedroom residences across three levels
Private plunge pool in each villa's walled court
Rooftop lounge under a vine-laced pergola
Terracotta roofs, arched balconies & bay windows
Walled, landscaped compound with gated entries
Betalbatim — the quiet green belt between Colva and the sunset sands
Minutes from Colva Beach, an easy drive to Margao
listings.location_note: Betalbatim is the green, low-rise village belt just north of Colva — South Goa's quieter answer to the northern beach towns, with Margao's conveniences fifteen minutes inland. Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Villa layouts, plot sizes, specifications, pricing & registration details shared on enquiry.

listings.name: Royal Oceanic Bliss
listings.short: A limited collection of just eight neoclassical 4 BHK pool villas on ~1.3 acres in Varca, South Goa — grand arched facades, private pools and jacuzzi master baths, with a residents' clubhouse, gym and gazebo gardens minutes from Varca Beach.
description: Royal Oceanic Bliss sits in Varca, on the quietest stretch of South Goa's Salcete coast — a village of white-sand beaches, seaside chapels and the luxury-resort belt that runs south towards Cavelossim, with Margao's markets and railway station an easy drive inland. This is the Goa of unhurried mornings and empty beaches, fifteen minutes from everything you need.

The collection is deliberately small: eight independent villas across roughly 1.3 acres, each a grand four-bedroom residence of about 4,896 sq ft in a neoclassical idiom — double-height arched windows, columned porte-cochère, terracotta roofs and walled garden courts. Inside, arched living rooms rise two storeys, the master bath is crowned by its own jacuzzi, and every villa keeps its own private pool and covered parking within its walls.

Life beyond your gate is equally considered: a branded entrance arch opens onto paved, palm-lined avenues, landscaped gardens with gazebos, and a residents' clubhouse with a billiards lounge and a fully equipped gymnasium. The project is under construction with completion targeted for December 2027 — villa layouts, specifications, pricing and registration details are shared on enquiry, along with a site visit at a time that suits you.
features: A limited collection of just eight independent villas on ~1.3 acres
Grand 4 BHK residences of about 4,896 sq ft each
Neoclassical facades — double-height arches & columned porte-cochère
Private swimming pool within every villa's walled court
Jacuzzi-crowned master bath in each residence
Residents' clubhouse with billiards lounge & gymnasium
Landscaped gardens, gazebos & palm-lined paved avenues
Gated entrance arch on the quiet Varca coastal belt
Minutes from Varca Beach, an easy drive to Margao
listings.location_note: Varca is the serene heart of South Goa's Salcete coast — long white-sand beaches without the northern crowds, a five-star resort belt for company, and Margao's conveniences fifteen minutes inland. Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Villa layouts, plot sizes, specifications, pricing & registration details shared on enquiry.
listings.amenities_note: Every villa is self-contained — pool, garden court and covered parking within its own walls — while the community adds a clubhouse life most villa projects skip.

listings.name: Kai Villas
listings.short: A gated lane of just seven Bali-style 3 BHK pool villas at Penha de França, on Porvorim's forested Panjim edge — tropical architecture, private pools and decks, with all of North Goa's beaches, dining and casinos within an easy half hour.
description: Kai Villas sits at Penha de França — the leafy, forested pocket where Porvorim slopes down to the Mandovi, minutes from Mall de Goa and the bridges into Panjim. It is the rare North Goa address that puts the whole map within reach: Miramar and the Candolim–Calangute–Baga beach run, the river casinos, Reis Magos fort and the capital's dining are all an easy drive, while home stays wrapped in green.

The collection is a single gated lane of seven villas (with future phases to follow) — each a three-bedroom, Bali-style home with its own swimming pool and deck, landscaped garden and paved driveway. Interiors keep the tropical language honest: terrazzo and wooden floors, exposed-brick accents, gypsum-smooth walls, a modular kitchen with hob and chimney, and bathrooms with glass-partitioned wet and dry zones. Construction is quake-resistant RCC with heat-insulated external blocks and full damp-proofing.

The community is built for lock-and-leave ease: an entrance gate with security cabin, CCTV, intercom, Wi-Fi, well-lit commons with full power backup, private parking and housekeeping on tap — plus professional rental management for owners who want their villa earning while they're away. Layouts, specifications and pricing are shared on enquiry.
features: A single gated lane of just seven Bali-style villas
Private swimming pool and deck with every villa
Landscaped gardens and paved driveways
Terrazzo & wooden floors with exposed-brick accents
Modular kitchen with hob and chimney
Glass-partitioned wet/dry bathrooms
Quake-resistant RCC structure, heat-insulated walls
Housekeeping, intercom, Wi-Fi & full common-area power backup
Professional rental management available for owners
listings.location_note: Penha de França is Porvorim's quiet riverside edge — forested lanes above the Mandovi, minutes from the capital yet apart from its noise, with the whole North Goa coast within a half-hour arc. Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Villa layouts, plot sizes, specifications, pricing & registration details shared on enquiry.
listings.amenities_note: Kai keeps the promise simple: a tropical home that runs itself — pool, garden and services handled, whether you live in it or let it.

listings.name: Casa Solaris
listings.short: A ready-to-move gated community of just ten sunlit pool villas at Maina–Sodiem, Siolim — 4 and 5 bedroom homes of 3,494–4,077 sq ft with a lift in every villa, skylit living spaces and private pools, minutes from Assagao's dining and Morjim's sands. RERA PRGO05242225.
description: Casa Solaris takes its name from the sun — and builds the whole home around it. Skylights and expansive glazing pour daylight into the ground-floor living and dining spaces, which open through a veranda to your own pool and garden. Around you: the paddy fields and low hills of Siolim, with Assagao's restaurant belt and the sands of Morjim and Vagator a short drive away.

Only ten villas make up the community, each rising three levels with a private lift — four or five bedrooms depending on the plan, with balconies and terraces at every turn. RERA carpet areas run from 2,238 to 2,963 sq ft (built-up 3,494 to 4,076.5 sq ft) across seven distinct layouts, so there is a plan to fit how you actually live. Every villa carries its own pool filtration, water tanks and STP, three-phase electricals and anti-skid flooring on a quake-resistant RCC frame.

The community is gated with round-the-clock security, and the villas are ready to move — no waiting on possession. The project is RERA-registered (PRGO05242225, Survey No. 244/1-A, Maina–Sodiem, Siolim). Floor plans, specifications and pricing are shared on enquiry, along with a site visit at a time that suits you.
features: A gated community of just ten villas in Siolim's green belt
Ready to move — immediate possession
4 and 5 bedroom layouts across seven plan variants
Private lift serving all three levels of every villa
Skylit living & dining opening to veranda, pool and garden
Individual pool filtration, water tanks & STP per villa
Round-the-clock gated security
RERA-registered: PRGO05242225
Minutes from Assagao's dining and Morjim & Vagator beaches

sizes.label: The Seven Layouts
sizes.headline: Ten villas, seven distinct plans — RERA carpet areas from 2,238 to 2,963 sq ft.
sizes.note: Figures are RERA carpet areas in sq ft with built-up areas as stated in the project plans; Villa 1's plan pairs four bedrooms with a servant's room, while Villa 10 runs five bedrooms across its three levels. Exact plan drawings for every villa are shared on enquiry.

listings.location_note: Siolim is North Goa's sweet spot — the quiet, green riverside village between Assagao's dining scene and the Morjim–Vagator coast, with hospitals and schools within a few kilometres and both Thivim station and Mopa airport within ~21 km. Distances are indicative and to be verified by the buyer.
listings.brokerage_note: Floor plans, specifications, pricing & registration details shared on enquiry.
listings.amenities_note: Every Casa Solaris villa is engineered to run independently — its own lift, pool plant, water and sewage systems — inside a gated, guarded community.

items: Only ten homes in the community
